descriptionAr: Stainless steel ball bearings are manufactured from high-quality 440C and 304-grade stainless steel. These bearings are found in many applications that require abrasion and corrosion-resistant bearings and food or medical grade applications. This stainless steel  ball bearing is manufactured to precision tolerances with state of the art manufacturing processes to produce a high-quality ball bearing. More specifically, bearings are open-style ball bearings, meaning that no seals or shields guard the interior balls within the bearing.
descriptionEn: Stainless steel ball bearings are manufactured from high-quality 440C and 304-grade stainless steel. These bearings are found in many applications that require abrasion and corrosion-resistant bearings and food or medical grade applications. This stainless steel  ball bearing is manufactured to precision tolerances with state of the art manufacturing processes to produce a high-quality ball bearing. More specifically, bearings are open-style ball bearings, meaning that no seals or shields guard the interior balls within the bearing.

descriptionAr:
Single row deep groove ball bearings are particularly versatile, have low friction and are optimized for low noise and low vibration, which enables high rotational speeds. They accommodate radial and axial loads in both directions, are easy to mount, and require less maintenance than many other bearing types.

Simple, versatile and robust design
Low friction
High-speed capability
Accommodate radial and axial loads in both directions
Require little maintenance

descriptionAr:
229 Ultra Red Supreme Waterproof Grease
Ultra Red Supreme is a multi-purpose, extra tacky, aluminum complex, waterproof grease made from severely hydrotreated polyalphaolefin (PAO) synthetic base fluids and a high viscosity index solvent refined, severely hydrofinished 100% paraffin base oils. Designed for durability, Ultra Supreme withstands the demands of heavy-duty automotive, industrial and off-road equipment. 
Ultra Red Supreme quickly plates to metal surfaces, offering solid, reliable protection that lasts longer than conventional greases. During periods of excessive pressure, increased heat and high shock loads, this grease resists breaking down and shields bearings from wear and tear.
Performance Benefits

Waterproof grease resists emulsifying, washing out and spraying off when exposed to moisture.
100% reversibility; grease retains consistency during intense pressure and severe mechanical action. 
Excellent shear and mechanical stability: grease stays in place, resists separating and running off components.
Increased oxidation stability.
Withstands pressures up to 500,000 psi while protecting against wear.
High dropping point.
Protects against rust and corrosion.
Excellent pumpability and flowability in low temperatures.
descriptionEn:

nameEn: بلي ابري || BK with a closed end
descriptionAr:
وصف : بليه ابري

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني






Drawn cup needle roller bearing with a closed endDrawn cup needle roller bearings are typically used in applications where the housing bore cannot be used as a raceway for a needle roller and cage assembly, but where a very compact and economical bearing arrangement is required. Owing to the large number of rollers, the bearings have a high load carrying capacity and stiffness. The closed end makes them suitable for bearing arrangements where they are situated at the end of a shaft.High radial load carrying capacity Accommodate small axial guidance forcesHigh stiffnessVery low cross-sectional height

nameEn: بلي كراسي بومبي   Pillow block insert bearing
descriptionAr:
وصف: بلي كرسيماركة: صيني 


 Pillow Block Bearings
Sealed bearing insert with grub screws to allow tightening against the shaft once fitted. This insert is typical of those found in housed bearings and has a spherical outer diameter to facilitate removal and re-fitting into a housing, It has a flat back to allow close proximity fitment of shafts and rollers.
descriptionEn:
وصف: بلي كرسيماركة: صيني 


 Pillow Block Bearings
Sealed bearing insert with grub screws to allow tightening against the shaft once fitted. This insert is typical of those found in housed bearings and has a spherical outer diameter to facilitate removal and re-fitting into a housing, It has a flat back to allow close proximity fitment of shafts and rollers.

 Pillow Block Bearings
Sealed bearing insert with eccentric shaft locking collar and grub screws to allow tightening against the shaft once fitted. This insert is typical of those found in housed bearings and has a spherical outer diameter to facilitate removal and re-fitting into a housing.

nameEn: بلي كراسي عدل بلجلبه  Pillow block insert bearing
descriptionAr:
وصف: بلي كرسيماركة: صيني 


 Pillow Block Bearings
This bearing is a light-duty ball bearing insert made to C3 precision standards and utilizes an eccentric locking collar to secure to a shaft. Our insert bearing has several features: a wide inner-ring, steel retainer, anti-rotation device, and an inner ring and outer ring made from bearing grade steel to produce a high-quality and long-lasting bearing.

nameEn: بلية طويل لينير لعمود مربع   HIWIN
descriptionAr:
وصف :بلية لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية - بدون جناح. لعمود مربع (يركب على عمودRGR)







ماركة:هايون HIWIN


بلد المنشاء: تايواني

يباع البلية مع المشحمة

HIWIN RGW Linear motion block for RGR guide rail






خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.

خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.

nameEn: بلي لينير بدون جناح لعمود مربع   HIWIN
descriptionAr:
وصف : بلية لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية - بجناح لعمود مربع 

(يركب على عمود EGR)بلد المنشاء: HIWINيباع البلية مع المشحمة خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.


EGW Linear motion block for EGR guide rail1. EG series is a low profile, high load capacity, and high rigidity guideway block2. It also features an equal load rating in all four directions and self-aligning capability to absorb installation-error, allowing for higher accuracies3. The lower assembly height and the shorter length make the EG series more suitable for high-speed, automation machines and applications where space is limited.

nameEn: ABBA  بليه لينير بجناح لعمود مربع
descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي  لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية. لعمود مربع(يركب على عمود ABBA)


ماركة:THK


بلد المنشاء: ياباني

يباع البلية مع المشحمة.


خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.

 Linear motion block for ABBA guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
THK series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.
 Linear motion block for ABBA guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
THK series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.
SHS-LV  Linear motion block for THK guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
THK series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.
HSR-LB Linear motion block for THK guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
THK series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.
KWVE-BL Linear motion block for INA guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
INA series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

descriptionAr:
وصف : بليه اتجاه واحد , بلي عدم رجوع 

ماركة: TRU SPRAGبلد المنشأ: تركي





    One Way Bearing 



Drawn Cup Needle Roller Bearing features a deep drawn, thin-walled outer ring. They are compact bearings with high load carrying capacity and stiffness.
These bearings are especially suitable for high dynamic loads or radial-limited installation. They are mounted with a tight interference fit in the housing.
Shoulders or snap rings are not required to locate the bearing axially, thus enables a simple and economic design of the housing bore.
For various applications such as automotive and truck transmissions, agricultural and construction equipment, pumps and compressors, and two-cycle engines, among others.
NOTE: Install with press machine or special tools instead of hammers because beating may lead to local deformation.

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني





    RCB Needle Roller Bearings, One Way Bearing 



Roller clutch and bearing assembly for transmitting torque in one direction while allowing free overrun in the opposite direction
Roller bearings on each end of the clutch for carrying radial loads
Drawn steel outer shell (cup) has a small cross-section for use in restricted spaces
Molded acetyl resin polymer clutch cage with an integral leaf spring for each roller
Through-hardened, high-carbon chromium steel rollers for heat tolerance and durability under heavy loads

وصف : بليه حديد علي حديد ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني

Angular Contact Spherical Plain bearingAngular contact spherical plain bearings are designed to accommodate combined radial and axial loads. Single bearings can accommodate axial loads acting in one direction. This specific design includes a steel/PTFE FRP sliding contact surface combination that is maintenance-free. However, relubrication, which can be applied from both sides, can extend bearing service life.

Designed for combined radial and axial loads
Separable inner and outer rings enable easier mounting
Long service life and maintenance-free
Relatively insensitive to contaminants
Low coefficient of friction

descriptionAr:
ماركة: HTB bearings

بلد المنشأ: صيني


 

WORKING PRINCIPLE: Deep groove ball bearings mainly bear radial load, but can also bear radial load and axial load at the same time. When it only bears radial load, the contact angle is zero. When the deep groove ball bearing has a large radial clearance, it has the performance of an angular contact bearing and can bear a large axial load.
ATTENTION : We used some r-u-s-t oil on the bearings,if you dont want the bearings get damage pls do not put it on the damp place.also when use you'd better use gloves to touch the bearings to prevent it get damage, as your finger with sweat.
SMALL FRACTION : With small friction and high-limit speed, these v groove pulley bearings are cost-effective and require little maintenance.
DURABLE MATERIAL : V Groove Bearing is Made with heat treating, provides high and uniform hardness, good wear resistance, and high contact fatigue performance.
SUITABLE FOR : Suitable for furniture hardware accessories, mobile doors, glass sliding doors, aluminum doors, shower pulleys and drawers, etc.

ماركة: HTB bearings

بلد المنشأ: صيني


 

WORKING PRINCIPLE: Deep groove ball bearings mainly bear radial load, but can also bear radial load and axial load at the same time. When it only bears radial load, the contact angle is zero. SMALL FRACTION : With small friction and high-limit speed, these v groove pulley bearings are cost-effective and require little maintenance.
DURABLE MATERIAL : V Groove Bearing is Made with heat treating, provides high and uniform hardness, good wear resistance, and high contact fatigue performance.
SUITABLE FOR : Suitable for furniture hardware accessories, mobile doors, glass sliding doors, aluminum doors, shower pulleys and drawers, etc.

descriptionAr:
وصف : بليه سرعات اسبندل

ماركة: HTBبلد المنشأ: صيني







Single-row angular contact ball bearing, supporting moderate one-directional thrust loads, and combined loads where thrust load is predominant
Ball contact angle of 40 degrees relative to the inner and outer raceways increases thrust load capacity
Open configuration for lubrication applied in place
Glass fiber reinforced polyamide plastic cage evenly spaces balls for reduced friction, vibration, and noise
Annular Bearing Engineering Committee (ABEC) 1 tolerance ratings for accuracy and low rotational speeds

Lubrication : Oil Grease Dry

descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي حديد علي حديد قلاب زور عاليماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني

GEEW / GEEM Spherical Plain Bearings
Spherical plain bearings requiring maintenance(steel-on-steel)generally have hardened sliding contact surface on both rings. The surfaces are treated with molybdenum disulphide and phosphated. It has characteristics of wear-resistance and wear-corrosion. Bearings with this sliding contact surface combination require regular re-lubrication. The high strength of the sliding contact surfaces makes these bearings especially suitable for bearing arrangements where heavy loads of alternating direction, shock loads or heavy static loads have to be accommodated.
With cylindrical extensions at each slide of inner ring.
Outer ring in chrome carbon steel, fractured, harden and phosphated.
Inner ring in chrome carbon steel, harden and phosphated.
2RS means bearings with seals on both ends.
descriptionEn:
وصف : بلي حديد علي حديد قلاب زور عاليماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني

GEEW / GEEM Spherical Plain Bearings
Spherical plain bearings requiring maintenance(steel-on-steel)generally have hardened sliding contact surface on both rings. The surfaces are treated with molybdenum disulphide and phosphated. It has characteristics of wear-resistance and wear-corrosion. Bearings with this sliding contact surface combination require regular re-lubrication. The high strength of the sliding contact surfaces makes these bearings especially suitable for bearing arrangements where heavy loads of alternating direction, shock loads or heavy static loads have to be accommodated.
With cylindrical extensions at each slide of inner ring.
Outer ring in chrome carbon steel, fractured, harden and phosphated.
Inner ring in chrome carbon steel, harden and phosphated.
2RS means bearings with seals on both ends.

Flange Housing PPThe pillow block housing PP for the installation of a bearing insert is made of sheet steel. It has a low weight and is suitable for space-saving installations. The housing can be mounted on flat surfaces via 2 holes. Misalignment of the shaft can be compensated to a certain extent by the spherical bearing seat.



housing with long base for a strong radial mounting by two bolts on flat surfaces
easy to mount, ready for installation and Operation
built-in insert is angularly movable
extremely light sheet steel housing
increased corrosion resistance due to galvanized steel sheet

Flange Housing PFLThe flange housing PFL for the installation of a bearing insert is made of sheet steel. The housing can be installed via 2 holes in various designs and is suitable for space-saving installations. Misalignments of the shaft can be compensated to a certain extent by the spherical bearing seat

oval design as a 2-hole flange bearing allows installation in a variety of applications, even with limited space at the installation site
extremely light sheet steel housing
easy to mount, ready for installation and Operation
built-in insert is angularly movable
increased corrosion resistance due to galvanized steel sheet

وصف : بليه ابري

Needle Roller / Angular Contact Ball Bearing NKSNeedle bearings are anti-friction bearings with a low radial height and high load capacity, which is used as a loose bearing and is part of the group of radial needle bearings. These bearings include machined outer rings, needle wreaths and removable inner rings, which means they can be supplied with or without inner ring in accordance with the application. Unlike the outer shells pulled cup needle bearings, which are produced by moulding process. the bearing rings are machine washable. Well-machined. Due to their bearing function non-location, the bearings cannot lead the shaft axially in any direction.

Needle Roller / Angular Contact Ball Bearing NKIBThe combined needle roller bearing NKIB combines the benefits of a radial needle roller bearing with those of a radial angular contact ball bearing and carries radial loads and axial loads in both directions. It is equipped with an inner ring and needs just a small radial installation space.

combination of a radial needle roller bearing and a radial angular contact ball bearing
suitable for high radial loads and low axial loads in both directions
suitable for high speeds
space-saving due to low radial section height
separable, the two-piece inner ring can be mounted easily
can be grease or oil lubricated
with circumferential groove and one lubrication hole in the outer ring

Needle Roller / Axial Cylindrical Roller Bearings NKXRThe combined needle roller bearing NKXR combines the benefits of a radial needle roller bearing with those of an axial cylindrical roller bearing and carries high radial loads and high axial loads in one direction. nameAr: ستانلس بلي ستة الافات || SS6300 STAINLESS
nameEn: ستانلس بلي ستة الافات || SS6300 STAINLESS
descriptionAr: Stainless steel ball bearings are manufactured from high-quality 440C and 304-grade stainless steel. These bearings are found in many applications that require abrasion and corrosion-resistant bearings and food or medical grade applications. This stainless steel  ball bearing is manufactured to precision tolerances with state of the art manufacturing processes to produce a high-quality ball bearing. More specifically, bearings are open-style ball bearings, meaning that no seals or shields guard the interior balls within the bearing.Even stainless steel can rust, stainless steel need proper care, prevent the moist air from coming into contact with the bearing, always use food-grade lubricant.

descriptionAr:
وصف: بلي كرسي ستانلسماركة: صيني 
   UC HOUSING (Radial Insert) BEARINGS :


with extended inner ring and grub screws for fixing the inner ring on a shaft
suitable for mounting in a housing bearing
suitable for high loads
smooth running and good behavior with tilting due to the extended inner ring
the spherical outer surface of the outer ring can compensate misalignment if it is installed in a corresponding housing
two-piece sealing system: with sheet steel washer reinforced rubber seal inside; outside additionally with upstream slinger made of sheet steel for high mechanical protection against foreign matter
lubricated for life; under normal operating conditions relubrication is not requiredApplications• Agriculture• Construction• Textile• Conveyors• Food & beverage packaging• Printing

descriptionAr:
وصف: بلي كرسي ستانلسماركة: صيني 

Stainless Pillow Block BearingsThis SUC stainless steel insert bearing is manufactured to C3 bearing precision standards . Our stainless steel insert bearings are found in a broad range of food grade and corrosive applications and can operate in temperature ranges -10F up to 250F. It features two 420-grade stainless steel M6 x 0.75 set screws for locking onto the shaft and is made from high-quality stainless steel grades. The rings and balls are made of 440C stainless, and the flinger and ball retainers are made of 302 stainless steel. This specific combination of stainless steels means that this bearing is food-grade and will have an optimal service life within the application. This SUC stainless steel bearing also features premium food-grade silicone rubber seals for keeping the lubricant in while keeping contaminants out.

وصف: بلي كرسي ستانلسماركة: صيني

وصف : بليه ابري

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني





NA Needle Roller Bearing without Inner Ring1.Needle Roller Bearings with Machined Rings and Inner Rings are separable-designed bearings with high load carrying capacity and stiffness.2.These bearings are especially suitable for high dynamic loads or radial-limited installation.3.Assembling inner and outer rings separately permits interference fits for shaft and housing.4.For various applications such as automotive and truck transmissions, agricultural and construction equipment, pumps and compressors, and two-cycle engines, among others.5.NOTE: Install with press machine or special tools instead of hammers because beating may lead to local deformation or brittle fracture.

descriptionAr:
وصف : بليه اتجاه واحد , بلي عدم رجوع 

ماركة: INAبلد المنشأ: ألمانيا





    HFL INA Needle Roller Bearings, One Way Bearing 



Drawn Cup Needle Roller Bearing features a deep drawn, thin-walled outer ring. They are compact bearings with high load carrying capacity and stiffness.
These bearings are especially suitable for high dynamic loads or radial-limited installation. They are mounted with a tight interference fit in the housing.
Shoulders or snap rings are not required to locate the bearing axially, thus enables a simple and economic design of the housing bore.
For various applications such as automotive and truck transmissions, agricultural and construction equipment, pumps and compressors, and two-cycle engines, among others.
NOTE: Install with press machine or special tools instead of hammers because beating may lead to local deformation.

descriptionAr:
وصف : اكوان صلب لبلي 

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني




LRT Inner Ring for bearingsInner rings can be integrated with shell-type or various machined needle roller bearings to provide good roller support without worrying about premature shaft wear. We heat-treat and grind our inner rings to tight tolerances to create hard, tough raceways for applications where it is impossible to make shaft surfaces to a specific hardness or roughness attribute. They’re an economical alternative to bushings because they don’t require any additional machining. Wide inner rings are also available to accommodate shafts that move axially or seals that are adjacent to bearings. Inner rings come in a broad range of shaft diameters, and assembly elements include small chamfers or gentle taper relief options.

We heat-treat and grind our inner rings to tight tolerances to create hard, tough raceways for applications where it is impossible to make shaft surfaces to a specific hardness or roughness attribute. They’re an economical alternative to bushings because they don’t require any additional machining. Wide inner rings are also available to accommodate shafts that move axially or seals that are adjacent to bearings. Inner rings come in a broad range of shaft diameters, and assembly elements include small chamfers or gentle taper relief options.

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني




LRT Inner Ring for bearingsInner rings can be integrated with shell-type or various machined needle roller bearings to provide good roller support without worrying about premature shaft wear. We heat-treat and grind our inner rings to tight tolerances to create hard, tough raceways for applications where it is impossible to make shaft surfaces to a specific hardness or roughness attribute. They’re an economical alternative to bushings because they don’t require any additional machining. Wide inner rings are also available to accommodate shafts that move axially or seals that are adjacent to bearings. Inner rings come in a broad range of shaft diameters, and assembly elements include small chamfers or gentle taper relief options.

KT Needle cage roller bearings.KT Series Radial Needle Roller and Cage Assembly Needle Roller Bearings.KT Needle roller and cage assemblies are self­-contained, ready-­to­-mount bearings. descriptionAr:
وصف :بلي بلح نايم بالطبق

ماركة: HTB bearings




The axial cylindrical roller bearing has a particularly small axial section height, offers extra stiffness and has a high load carrying capacity
Supports high axial forces in one direction
Dismountable
Lighter and narrower than series 812
Cage material: brass. Special strength and durability under extreme conditions such as shock loads and vibrations, high acceleration forces and lack of lubrication.

descriptionAr:
وصف : اكوان صلب لبلي 

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني




LRT Inner Ring for bearingsInner rings can be integrated with shell-type or various machined needle roller bearings to provide good roller support without worrying about premature shaft wear. We heat-treat and grind our inner rings to tight tolerances to create hard, tough raceways for applications where it is impossible to make shaft surfaces to a specific hardness or roughness attribute. They’re an economical alternative to bushings because they don’t require any additional machining. Wide inner rings are also available to accommodate shafts that move axially or seals that are adjacent to bearings. Inner rings come in a broad range of shaft diameters, and assembly elements include small chamfers or gentle taper relief options.
descriptionEn:
وصف : اكوان صلب لبلي 

ماركة: HTB bearingsبلد المنشأ: صيني

They’re an economical alternative to bushings because they don’t require any additional machining. descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي كور بالطبق

ماركة: HTB bearings




Consists of a shaft washer, a spherical housing washer and a ball cage assembly
Suitable for very high axial loads in one direction
Cage material: sheet steel, high load-bearing capacity and high strength; suitable for continuous high temperatures
Can be dismantled, the bearing washers and the ball cage assembly can be mounted separately

nameEn: بليه لينير بدون جناح لعمود مربع   PMI
descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي بدون جناح لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية. لعمود مربع (يركب على عمود PMI)






ماركة:PMI


بلد المنشاء: تايواني



يباع البلية مع المشحمة.

MSA Linear motion block for PMI guide rail




خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.




MSB Linear motion block for PMI guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
MSB series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

nameAr: بلي ابري نايم بالطبق بشفه || AXW
nameEn: بلي ابري نايم بالطبق بشفه || AXW
descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي ابري نايم بالطبق بشفه

ماركة: HTB bearings





Axial Needle Roller and Cage Assembly AXW

it consists of an Axial Needle Roller And Cage Assembly which securely guides a great number of needle rollers in a dimensionally stable cage and an housing locating washer with centering collar
it can support high axial loads in one direction
suitable for a shock-resistant arrangement
small dimensions and therefore suitable for space-saving installation
the flat housing locating washer is exactly centered in the housing bore due to the centering collar and thus facilitates the assembly
In combination with radial needle roller bearings suitable for combined, radial and axial loads; fitting radial needle roller bearings can be found in the following table

وصف : بلي ابري نايم بالطبق

ماركة: HTB bearings





Axial Needle Roller and Cage Assembly AXK

Chromium steel rollers for heat tolerance and durability under heavy loads; Steel cage guides and evenly spaced rollers for reduced friction, vibration, and noise
Needle Roller Thrust Bearings can accommodate loads in one direction only
Combined with 2 washers for applications where adjacent machine components cannot serve as raceways

يباع البلية مع المشحمةوصف : بليه لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية - بدون جناح. لعمود مربع قـطره (يركب على عمود EGR)


ماركة: HTB bearings










خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.

EGH Linear motion block for EGR guide rail1. EG series is a low profile, high load capacity, and high rigidity guideway block2. It also features an equal load rating in all four directions and self-aligning capability to absorb installation-error, allowing for higher accuracies3. The lower assembly height and the shorter length make the EG series more suitable for high-speed, automation machines and applications where space is limited.

nameEn: بليه لينير بدون جناح لعمود مربع   PMI
descriptionAr:
وصف : بلي بدون جناح لينير, بلية سكة, بلية خطية. لعمود مربع (يركب على عمود PMI)






ماركة:PMI


بلد المنشاء: تايواني



يباع البلية مع المشحمة.

MSA Linear motion block for PMI guide rail




خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.




MSB Linear motion block for PMI guide rail


The trains of balls are designed to a contact angle of 45° which enables it to bear an equal load in radial, reversed radial and lateral directions. Therefore, it can be applied in any installation direction.
MSB series can achieve a well balanced preload for increasing rigidity in four directions while keeping a low frictional resistance. This is especially suit to high precision and high rigidity required motion.
The patent design of lubrication route makes the lubricant evenly distribute in each circulation loop.
The optimum lubrication can be achieved in any installation direction, and this promotes the performance in running accuracy, service life, and reliability.Compact.
Four-way Equal Load Self Alignment Capability Smooth Movement with Low Noise Interchangeability.

(يركب على عمود EGR)بلد المنشاء: صينييباع البلية مع المشحمة خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.


EGW Linear motion block for EGR guide rail1. EG series is a low profile, high load capacity, and high rigidity guideway block2. It also features an equal load rating in all four directions and self-aligning capability to absorb installation-error, allowing for higher accuracies3. The lower assembly height and the shorter length make the EG series more suitable for high-speed, automation machines and applications where space is limited.

descriptionAr:
وصف: تثبيت,كرسي ستانلس مربع (كرسي فقط)ماركة: صيني 

SF  Stainless Steel  Flanged Housing unit for Shaft

Suitable for high radial loads and is hygienic and corrosion resistant with its stainless steel housing and stainless steel bearing insert.The housing is made of stainless steel and is therefore hygienic and corrosion-resistant.lubricated for life; under normal operating conditions relubrication is not required

CSK 6000 PP Clutch Bearing with both side keyways.The CSK series is a one-way (clutch) bearing.One way Bearing Sprag/Clutch Freewheel and also called as Backstops. The one-way bearings are used in any application that requires one direction rotation, such as mining, hydraulic, textile, printing and washing machines, conveyor systems that carry products to a higher level should not be reversed because of gravity during any power shortage.

descriptionAr:
وصف: تثبيت,كرسي بلاستيك بيضاوي لعمود  (كرسي فقط)ماركة: صيني 


Suitable for high radial loads and for installation in various applications. It is hygienic and corrosion resistant with its plastic housing and stainless steel bearing insert.the housing is made of plastic and is therefore lightweight, hygienic, corrosion-resistant and cushioning.the bearing is used particularly in the food and beverage industry as well as in the pharmaceutical industry

descriptionAr:
Single row deep groove ball bearings are particularly versatile, have low friction and are optimized for low noise and low vibration, which enables high rotational speeds. They accommodate radial and axial loads in both directions, are easy to mount, and require less maintenance than many other bearing types.

Simple, versatile and robust design
Low friction
High-speed capability
Accommodate radial and axial loads in both directions
Require little maintenance

ماركة: صيني




CSK 25P Clutch Bearing with Inside keyways.The CSK series is a one-way (clutch) bearing. One way Bearing Sprag /Clutch Freewheel and also called Backstops. The one-way bearings are used in any application that requires one-direction rotation, such as mining, hydraulic, textile, printing, and washing machines, conveyor systems that carry products to a higher level should not be reversed because of gravity during any power shortage.

ماركة:هايون HIWIN


بلد المنشاء: تايواني

يباع البلية مع المشحمة

HIWIN HGH Linear motion block for HGR guide rail.




خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.

بلد المنشاء: صيني

يباع البلية مع المشحمة.



خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.

EGH Linear motion block for EGR guide rail1. EG series is a low profile, high load capacity, and high rigidity guideway block2. It also features an equal load rating in all four directions and self-aligning capability to absorb installation-error, allowing for higher accuracies3. The lower assembly height and the shorter length make the EG series more suitable for high-speed, automation machines and applications where space is limited.

خطوات التثبيت:1. قم بمحاذاة نهاية القضيب مع البلية.2. استخدم القضيب لدفع السكة البلاستيكي ببطء.3. تسقط السكة البلاستيكية بشكل طبيعي حتى يتم تحميل البلية بالكامل في القضيب.


احتياطات التثبيت:عند التثبيت ، لا تقم بإزالة السكة البلاستيكية من البلية مسبقًا ، وإلا فسوف تتسبب بسهولة في سقوط الكرة الفولاذية في شريط التمرير أثناء التجميع ولا يمكن تثبيتها واستخدامها بشكل طبيعي.
